name: XXL Foil Print Starburst Wedding Gift Bag White/Gold - Spritz™
description:
Make their big day feel even more special with a decorative Colossal Wedding Decorative Gift Bag from Spritz™. The elegant, patterned design is enhanced with gold metallic foil and is certain to capture the happy couple’s attention when they go through their gifts. You’ll bring extra class to any meaningful moment with this Spritz™ colossal wedding decorative gift bag.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment.
